creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

When building SOGo 4 in poudriere with `poudriere bulk -t`, the following Q/A problem is reported:


====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: 'GNUstep/Local/Library/Frameworks/SOGo.framework/Versions/4/sogo/libSOGo.so.4.3.2' is referring to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/sogo4/work/stage
*** Error code 1


The full log is available here:
https://packages.blogreen.org/data/12_1_RELEASE_amd64-default/2020-10-20_19h51m34s/logs/errors/sogo4-4.3.2.log
